label: Gainsight
description: Connect to Gainsight to sync customer health scores, accounts, and success data into Anton.

form.title: Connect Gainsight
form.subtitle: Paste your Access Key and tenant URL to give Anton access to your Gainsight data.

methods.label: Access Key
methods.description: Paste an Access Key from Gainsight Administration → Connectors 2.0 → Auth → Access Keys along with your tenant URL. The simplest and recommended path.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Gainsight Access Key

### Steps

1. Log in to Gainsight as an admin.
2. Navigate to **Administration** (gear icon in the top-right).
3. Go to **Connectors 2.0** in the left sidebar.
4. Click the **Auth** tab, then select **Access Keys**.
5. Click **Generate Key** (or **Add Key**). Give it a descriptive name like `Anton`.
6. Copy the generated Access Key — it may only be shown once. Store it somewhere safe.
7. Find your tenant URL — it is the base URL you use to log in to Gainsight, e.g. `https://yourcompany.gainsight.com`.
8. Paste both the Access Key and your tenant URL into the fields below.

### Notes

- The Access Key grants API-level access scoped to the permissions of the admin user who created it. Use a dedicated admin account where possible.
- If the key is ever compromised, return to **Administration → Connectors 2.0 → Auth → Access Keys** and revoke it, then generate a new one.
- Different Gainsight editions (NXT, Salesforce Edition) may have slightly different navigation; consult the [Gainsight API docs](https://support.gainsight.com/SFDC_Edition/API_and_Developer_Docs/Gainsight_API) if your UI differs.

fields.name: tenant_url
fields.label: Tenant URL
fields.description: The base URL of your Gainsight instance — the same URL you use to log in.

fields.name: access_key
fields.label: Access Key
fields.description: Found in Administration → Connectors 2.0 → Auth → Access Keys. Copy and paste the full key.
